title: Ethereum Blockchain Core Architecture & Transaction Flow
description: A diagram illustrating the key components of the Ethereum blockchain and the flow of a typical transaction from initiation to block confirmation.
relationships: User creates and signs a transaction (Tx) to call a function or send Ether
Transaction is broadcast to the P2P network of Nodes
Validator nodes execute the transaction via the EVM, updating contract state
Executed transaction is bundled into a new Block
New block is cryptographically linked to the previous one (chain)
Updated World State is replicated across all nodes in the network
